config.name: cohesity_backup-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cohesity_backup-latest 
-- OCSF Class: System Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:59:00.321352

-- Pre-compile regex patterns for better performance
local timestamp_pattern = "(%d%d%d%d)-(%d%d)-(%d%d)T(%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d)Z"

-- Status code mappings
local status_map = {
    STARTED = {id = 1, name = "Start", severity = 1},
    SUCCESS = {id = 2, name = "Stop", severity = 1}, 
    FAILED = {id = 3, name = "Stop", severity = 3},
    WARNING = {id = 4, name = "Stop", severity = 2}
}

-- Severity mappings
local severity_map = {
    [1] = "Informational",
    [2] = "Medium", 
    [3] = "High"
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with required OCSF fields
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "System Activity",
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "System",
        metadata = {},
        job = {},
        resource = {},
        actor = {
            user = {}
        }
    }

    -- Extract fields using optimized pattern matching
    local run_id = record.runId
    local job_name = record.jobName
    local object_name = record.objectName
    local status = record.status
    local duration = record.duration
    local bytes = record.bytesProtected
    local throughput = record.throughput
    local error = record.error
    local initiated_by = record.initiatedBy
    local message = record.message

    -- Required field validation
    if not run_id or not status then
        return nil, "Missing required fields"
    end

    -- Efficient field mapping
    output.metadata.correlation_uid = run_id
    output.job.name = job_name
    output.resource.name = object_name
    output.status = status
    output.duration = tonumber(duration)
    output.traffic = {
        bytes = tonumber(bytes)
    }
    output.throughput = throughput
    output.status_detail = error
    output.actor.user.name = initiated_by
    output.message = message

    -- Map status to activity and severity
    local status_info = status_map[status] or {id = 99, name = "Other", severity = 1}
    output.activity_id = status_info.id
    output.activity_name = status_info.name
    output.severity_id = status_info.severity
    output.severity = severity_map[status_info.severity]

    -- Parse timestamp if present
    if record.timestamp then
        local year, month, day, hour, min, sec = record.timestamp:match(timestamp_pattern)
        if year then
            output.time = os.time({
                year = tonumber(year),
                month = tonumber(month),
                day = tonumber(day),
                hour = tonumber(hour),
                min = tonumber(min),
                sec = tonumber(sec)
            }) * 1000
        end
    end

    -- Default timestamp if not set
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end
